allow:
Bash(powershell -Command "@'
select vdisk file=\\"C:\\Users\\Administrator\\AppData\\Local\\Docker\\wsl\\disk\\docker_data.vhdx\\"
attach vdisk readonly
compact vdisk
detach vdisk
'@ | diskpart" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "@'
select vdisk file=\\"C:\\Users\\Administrator\\AppData\\Local\\wsl\\{4c0e7e2b-75b2-42d8-bf11-cac8c7c12814}\\ext4.vhdx\\"
attach vdisk readonly
compact vdisk
detach vdisk
'@ | diskpart" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object @{N='FreeGB';E={[math]::Round\(\\$_.Free/1GB,2\)}}; Get-Item 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\AppData\\Local\\Docker\\wsl\\disk\\docker_data.vhdx' | Select-Object @{N='SizeGB';E={[math]::Round\(\\$_.Length/1GB,2\)}}; Get-Item 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\AppData\\Local\\wsl\\{4c0e7e2b-75b2-42d8-bf11-cac8c7c12814}\\ext4.vhdx' | Select-Object @{N='SizeGB';E={[math]::Round\(\\$_.Length/1GB,2\)}}" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Process 'C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe'; Write-Output 'Docker Desktop launching...'" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process 'Docker Desktop','dockerd','com.docker*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Id,CPU | Format-Table -AutoSize" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\AppData\\Local\\Docker\\wsl\\disk\\' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,@{N='SizeGB';E={[math]::Round\(\\$_.Length/1GB,2\)}},LastWriteTime; Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object @{N='FreeGB';E={[math]::Round\(\\$_.Free/1GB,2\)}}" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process 'docker' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {!\\$_.MainWindowTitle} | Select-Object Id,Name,CPU; wsl --status 2>&1" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process 'docker' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Output 'Killed hanging docker processes'; Start-Sleep 3; wsl -d docker-desktop -- echo 'wsl docker-desktop ok' 2>&1" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process 'docker' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Stop-Process -Name 'Docker Desktop','com.docker.backend','com.docker.build' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 5; Write-Output 'Docker Desktop stopped'; wsl --shutdown 2>&1; Write-Output 'WSL shutdown'" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Sleep 3; Start-Process 'C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe'; Write-Output 'Docker Desktop restarting...'" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem '\\$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Docker\\log\\' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 5 Name,LastWriteTime" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "wsl -d docker-desktop -- sh -c 'ps aux | grep docker' 2>&1 | head -10" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Sleep 30; wsl -d docker-desktop -- sh -c 'ps aux | grep dockerd' 2>&1; Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object @{N='FreeGB';E={[math]::Round\(\\$_.Free/1GB,2\)}}" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name 'Docker Desktop','com.docker.backend','com.docker.build' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; wsl --shutdown 2>&1; Start-Sleep 5; Start-Process 'C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe'; Write-Output 'Restarted'" 2>&1)
